pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build configuration claims to target Java 17, which is inconsistent with the migration goal and may prevent usage of Java 21 specific features or cause warnings/errors if strict compliance is enforced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the maven-compiler-plugin to use source and target level 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this explicit configuration, the compiler might default to an older version or the property might not be picked up correctly by the plugin configuration, leading to compilation errors for Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok to the annotation processor paths in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, Lombok annotations will not be processed during compilation, leading to compile errors for classes using Lombok features.
